# Research

Agents for web research, paper reading, and analytical briefings.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Arxiv Paper Reader](./arxiv-paper-reader/): Explains technical papers and practical implications.
  Best for: source-backed analysis, technical reading. Tags: `research`, `analysis`, `arxiv`, `paper`.
- [Earnings Tracker](./earnings-tracker/): Summarizes earnings materials and management signal.
  Best for: source-backed analysis, technical reading. Tags: `research`, `analysis`, `earnings`.
- [Web Research Analyst](./web-research-analyst/): Turns broad research questions into source-backed findings.
  Best for: source-backed analysis, technical reading. Tags: `research`, `analysis`, `web`.
